# How to Contribute
If you want to contribute to the project, the first thing we ask you is to join our Discord server: [Weird Wizard for Foundry](https://discord.gg/X5XustKpe4).

Our Discord server is the project's main source of communication for the community as a whole, users and contributors. So please be with us!

Once there, you can:
- Check the current planned features and improvements for the next updates in `#rough-roadmap`.
- Make `#bug-reports` in the dedicated channel.
- Make suggestions in the `suggestions` forum.
- Talk to the developer team, contributors and engaged community users in `#development-chat`, as well as make any questions and proposals you have.

We believe coordinating efforts is better for everyone, so let's do it together!
# Past Contributions
This project was created by @Savantford (also known as **Friend**), and is currently maintained by Friend and [@yschnellbach](https://github.com/yschnellbach).

However, many small and big contributions were done directly to the system in the past, which we are are all grateful for!

For a complete list of all people who contributed to the system at least once, please see [Contributors](https://github.com/Savantford/foundry-weirdwizard/graphs/contributors?all=1).

**A huge thanks to everyone who contributed to the project!**
